methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
description: KTLO objectives for shared reliability, compliance, and monetization integrity work.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Maintain platform trust across identity, privacy, and monetization
companyObjectives.statement: Keep account, consent, and revenue-critical systems reliable enough that reader and advertiser trust do not degrade.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Trust and revenue KTLO goal
objectives.objective: Reduce operational risk across identity, consent, and billing foundations.

keyResults.metric: Identity, consent, and billing exception rate
keyResults.statement: Keep trust- and revenue-critical errors within tolerance.

executingTeams.intent: Maintain identity, privacy, and measurement integrity.

supportingTeams.intent: Maintain billing correctness and revenue integrity.
